import Button from "../components/common/Button"; import Icon from "../components/common/Icon/Icon"; import { useCart } from "../context/CartContext"; import "./Cart.css"; export default function Cart() { const { cartItems, addToCart, removeFromCart, updateQuantity, clearCart, getTotalItems, getTotalPrice, } = useCart(); if (cartItems.length === 0) { return (

Tu carrito está vacío

Agrega algunos productos para empezar a comprar

); } return (

Carrito de Compras

{`Tu carrito tiene ${getTotalItems()} articulo(s)`}{" "} {/* Corregir template literal */}
{cartItems.map((item) => (

{item.name}

{`$${item.price.toFixed(2)}`}

{item.quantity}
${(item.price * item.quantity).toFixed(2)}
))}

Total: ${getTotalPrice().toFixed(2)}

); }
